proposed_hypotheses.text: Across dependency outcomes, higher `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative dependency scores, consistent with a broad screen-growth effect rather than a gene-specific dependency.
Across dependency outcomes, higher `cas9_activity_score` is associated with more negative dependency scores, consistent with stronger knockout efficiency increasing measured dependency.

analyses.result_summary: Linear regression of `dependency_BRAF` on `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`: slope -0.1101 dependency units per doubling/day, z=-12.63, p=1.53e-36.
Linear regression of `dependency_BRAF` on `cas9_activity_score`: slope -0.0744, z=-5.09, p=3.62e-07.
Linear regression of `dependency_EGFR` on `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`: slope -0.1080, z=-13.44, p=3.36e-41.
Linear regression of `dependency_EGFR` on `cas9_activity_score`: slope -0.1031, z=-7.66, p=1.85e-14.
Linear regression of `dependency_POLR2A` on `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`: slope -0.3048, z=-39.10, p underflowed below machine precision.
Linear regression of `dependency_TMED10` on `cas9_activity_score`: slope -0.1040, z=-7.98, p=1.41e-15.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e=0`.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines without EGFR amplification.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines without ERBB2 amplification.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines without KRAS mutation.

analyses.result_summary: `braf_v600e=1` lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8047 versus -0.2495 in other lines; difference -0.5552, z=-111.15, p underflowed below machine precision.
`egfr_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6010 versus -0.2524 in other lines; difference -0.3486, z=-60.31, p underflowed below machine precision.
`erbb2_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6856 versus -0.2535 in other lines; difference -0.4321, z=-81.69, p underflowed below machine precision.
`kras_mutation=1` lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5594 versus -0.2520 in other lines; difference -0.3075, z=-83.28, p underflowed below machine precision.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `nf1_loss=0`, indicating RAS-pathway rewiring creates RIT1 dependency.

analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss=1` lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3527 versus -0.2572 in other lines; difference -0.0955, z=-17.74, p=2.03e-70.

Selected biological pair screen found `nf1_loss=1 AND myc_amplification=1` with mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3638 versus -0.2645 in other lines; effect -0.0993, p=2.0e-14, only slightly stronger than NF1 loss alone.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `lineage=colorectal` cell lines have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal lines.
Cell lines with `apc_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `apc_mutation=0`.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `wnt_activity_score` (`wnt_activity_score >= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than the rest of the dataset.

analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.7204 versus -0.2524 in other lines; difference -0.4680, z=-53.34, p underflowed below machine precision.
`apc_mutation=1` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.5447 versus -0.2526 in other lines; difference -0.2921, z=-44.70, p underflowed below machine precision.
High-WNT lines (`wnt_activity_score >= 0.819`) had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.4694 versus -0.2526 in other lines; difference -0.2168, z=-40.14, p underflowed below machine precision.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative `dependency_KIF18A` effect of `apc_mutation=1` is concentrated in `lineage=colorectal` cell lines rather than being uniform across lineages.
The negative `dependency_KIF18A` effect of high `wnt_activity_score` is concentrated in `lineage=colorectal` cell lines rather than being uniform across lineages.
The combination `apc_mutation=1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819` marks a subgroup with more negative `dependency_KIF18A` than either feature alone.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction contrast for `apc_mutation=1` by `lineage=colorectal`: APC effect within colorectal minus APC effect outside colorectal was -0.6822 dependency units, z=-47.98, p underflowed below machine precision.
Interaction contrast for high WNT by `lineage=colorectal`: high-WNT effect within colorectal minus high-WNT effect outside colorectal was -0.6691, z=-48.02, p underflowed below machine precision.
Interaction contrast for `apc_mutation=1` by high WNT: APC effect in high-WNT lines minus APC effect in lower-WNT lines was -0.4698, z=-40.55, p underflowed below machine precision.

The triple subgroup `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.1119 versus -0.2530 in all other lines; difference -0.8589, z=-79.07, p underflowed below machine precision.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 AND smad4_loss=0`; this subgroup has markedly more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

Within the colorectal/APC-mutant/high-WNT context, `smad4_loss=1` suppresses the `dependency_KIF18A` effect, so `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 AND smad4_loss=1` does not show the strong negative dependency.

analyses.result_summary: The complete subgroup `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 AND smad4_loss=0` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.2990 versus -0.2530 in other lines; difference -1.0460, z=-111.08, p underflowed below machine precision.

The matched subgroup with `smad4_loss=1` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2557 versus -0.3074 in all other lines; effect +0.0517, z=3.68, p=2.35e-04, showing loss of the negative dependency rather than enhancement.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines in the top quartile of `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` (`rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than lower-MYC-expression lines.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than cell lines without MYC amplification.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines without MYC amplification.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `copy_number_8q24` (`copy_number_8q24 >= 0.428`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than lower-8q24-copy-number lines.

analyses.result_summary: High-MYC-expression lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3551 versus -0.3265 in other lines; difference -0.0286, z=-7.94, p=1.95e-15.
`myc_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3491 versus -0.3307 in other lines; difference -0.0184, z=-4.30, p=1.68e-05.
`myc_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3614 versus -0.2523 in other lines; difference -0.1091, z=-25.54, p=7.04e-144.
High-8q24-copy lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3440 versus -0.2452 in other lines; difference -0.0988, z=-27.17, p=1.53e-162.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `dependency_TMED10` is more negative in high-growth-rate lines (`growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`) than in other lines, but selected molecular features do not define a stronger biologically specific TMED10 subgroup.

`dependency_POLR2A` is more negative in high-growth-rate lines (`growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`) than in other lines, with the dominant pattern explained by growth-rate-related broad essentiality rather than a selected molecular subgroup.

analyses.result_summary: High-growth lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2816 versus -0.2447 in other lines; difference -0.0369, z=-10.19, p=2.22e-24.

The strongest selected biological TMED10 pair found was `egfr_amplification=1 AND apc_mutation=1`, with mean -0.2834 versus -0.2536; effect -0.0298 and nominal p=0.044, smaller and less robust than the growth-rate effect.
High-growth lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4972 versus -0.3928 in other lines; difference -0.1043, z=-28.86, p=4.27e-183.

The strongest selected biological POLR2A pair was `myc_amplification=1 AND rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm >= 3.559`, with mean -0.4382 versus -0.4182; effect -0.0200, nominal p=0.013, far smaller than the growth-rate effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `dependency_BRAF`, the final best-supported subgroup is `braf_v600e=1`; adding selected second predicates such as `smad4_loss=0` does not improve on the core driver effect.
For `dependency_EGFR`, the final best-supported subgroup is `egfr_amplification=1`; selected pairwise subgroups are explained by EGFR amplification rather than a stronger modifier.
For `dependency_ERBB2`, the final best-supported subgroup is `erbb2_amplification=1`; selected pairwise subgroups remain driven by ERBB2 amplification.
For `dependency_KRAS`, the final best-supported subgroup is `kras_mutation=1`; selected pairwise subgroups remain driven by KRAS mutation.

analyses.result_summary: Selected pair screen: `braf_v600e=1 AND smad4_loss=0` had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8033 versus -0.2582 in other lines; effect -0.5450, similar to the `braf_v600e=1` main effect (-0.5552).

Selected pair screen: `egfr_amplification=1 AND rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669` had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6240 versus -0.2729; effect -0.3511, similar to the EGFR-amplification main effect (-0.3486).
Selected pair screen: `erbb2_amplification=1 AND smad4_loss=0` had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6855 versus -0.2594; effect -0.4261, similar to the ERBB2-amplification main effect (-0.4321).
Selected pair screen: `kras_mutation=1 AND smad4_loss=0` had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5600 versus -0.2684; effect -0.2916, similar to the KRAS-mutant main effect (-0.3075).

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `dependency_RIT1`, the final best-supported subgroup is `nf1_loss=1`, with no selected pairwise modifier materially improving the NF1-loss effect.
For `dependency_KIF18A`, the final best-supported subgroup is `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 AND smad4_loss=0`, with `smad4_loss=1` suppressing the dependency.

For `dependency_DHX9`, the final best-supported molecular subgroup is high `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`, with MYC amplification providing weaker support and no strong MYC-amplification-by-expression interaction.

For `dependency_TMED10`, the systematic heterogeneity search did not identify a convincing molecular subgroup beyond high `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` and high `cas9_activity_score` screen covariates.
For `dependency_POLR2A`, the systematic heterogeneity search did not identify a convincing molecular subgroup beyond the strong high-`growth_rate_doublings_per_day` effect.
For `dependency_RPL11`, the final best-supported molecular subgroup is `myc_amplification=1` with high `copy_number_8q24`; this is consistent with 8q24/MYC-linked RPL11 dependency.

analyses.result_summary: Selected pair screen: `nf1_loss=1 AND myc_amplification=1` had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3638 versus -0.2645; effect -0.0993, only slightly larger than the NF1-loss main effect (-0.0955).

Final KIF18A subgroup re-tested: `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 AND smad4_loss=0` effect -1.0460, p underflowed below machine precision; the corresponding `smad4_loss=1` subgroup effect was +0.0517, p=2.35e-04.

Selected pair screen: `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669 AND smad4_loss=1` had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3694 versus -0.3324; effect -0.0370, p=1.5e-05. The MYC-amplification-by-high-expression interaction was not significant (interaction +0.0115, p=0.199).

No selected molecular pair for TMED10 approached the high-growth-rate effect; the top nominal pair was `egfr_amplification=1 AND apc_mutation=1` with effect -0.0298, p=0.044, versus high-growth effect -0.0369, p=2.22e-24.

No selected molecular pair for POLR2A approached the high-growth-rate effect; the top nominal pair was `myc_amplification=1 AND rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm >= 3.559` with effect -0.0200, p=0.013, versus high-growth effect -0.1043, p=4.27e-183.

Selected pair screen: `myc_amplification=1 AND copy_number_8q24 >= 0.428` had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3647 versus -0.2524; effect -0.1123, p=3.5e-148. The formal interaction of MYC amplification by high 8q24 was not significant (p=0.080), so the pair is best interpreted as overlapping MYC/8q24 signal.
